_comment: Merge this into your ~/.claude/settings.json under the 'hooks' key.
_instructions: 2. Add or merge the 'hooks' object below into your existing settings
3. Replace VAULT_PATH with the absolute path to your claude-memory directory
4. The PreCompact hook backs up transcripts before context compaction
IMPORTANT — Do NOT add a Stop hook for flush.py:
Stop fires on EVERY assistant response, not just at session end.
In a 50-turn tmux session this spawns O(50) concurrent flush.py processes,
each making a full LLM API call. This is what caused the $1.80 runaway on
2026-04-11. SessionEnd fires once at true session exit and is the correct hook.
SessionEnd is not yet wired — enable it only after confirming flush.py works
correctly with a manually triggered test run.

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -n "$CLAUDE_TRANSCRIPT_PATH" ]; then cp "$CLAUDE_TRANSCRIPT_PATH" VAULT_PATH/sessions/backup-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).jsonl 2>/dev/null || true; fi'
